saferAlternative: Use targeted file deletion with explicit paths and code review.
Use Remove-Item with explicit files and -WhatIf first.

reason: Hard reset discards local changes and is blocked.
saferAlternative: Use targeted file edits or explicit non-destructive git status and diff workflows.
Use focused edits and review diffs instead of destructive checkout restore.

reason: Piped remote script execution is blocked.
saferAlternative: Download script, inspect it, then run with explicit checksum verification.

reason: Remote content execution via Invoke-Expression is blocked.
saferAlternative: Save remote content to a file, inspect it, and run only trusted code.

reason: Overly permissive recursive chmod is blocked.
saferAlternative: Apply minimum required permissions to specific paths.

reason: Installing Python packages over plain HTTP or with TLS bypassed is blocked.
saferAlternative: Use HTTPS package sources only; remove --trusted-host and http:// index-url overrides.

reason: Installing npm packages from a plain HTTP registry is blocked.
saferAlternative: Use HTTPS registry URLs only (--registry https://).

reason: Potential real secret write to .env is blocked.
saferAlternative: Use placeholder values and inject real secrets through secure environment management.
